jobs.name: Daily AI Trends on Twitter

payload.message: Using browser, check these X accounts for latest AI news (public, no login needed): @sama, @elonmusk, @AndrewYNg, @ylecun, Yester Su, @StabilityAI, @GoogleDeepMind, @AnthropicAI, @sutterray. For each account, scroll to see recent posts (last 2-3 tweets each). Focus on: product announcements, funding news, research releases, breaking AI news. Cross-reference with TechCrunch, VentureBeat for verification. Present top 5 stories with: account, tweet summary, why it matters.

jobs.description: Daily AI News from X via browser
